title: Python Dataset Demo
text:
import pandas as pd

data = {
    "tool": ["EC2", "Quarto", "GitHub Pages"],
    "purpose": ["Cloud VM", "Publishing", "Hosting"],
    "version": ["Ubuntu 24.04", "1.8.24", "Pages"]
}

df = pd.DataFrame(data)
df
